title: willoughbya lindbergii
intro: Willoughbya lindbergii, also known as the New Zealand tree fern, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Dicksoniaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are said to have various health benefits. The plant is believed to help with wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Willoughbya lindbergii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
